use_cases: Display streaming analytics data with animated line chart visualization
Monitor real-time metrics on dashboards with hover tooltips showing exact values
Show time-series data with gradient-filled area charts that update live
Visualize fluctuating metrics like CPU usage, stock prices, or user activity
ai_summary: A real-time analytics line chart component with animated data streaming. Features gradient-filled area visualization, hover tooltips displaying precise data point values, and smooth transitions as new points slide into view. Built with React hooks for live data updates, making it ideal for dashboards requiring continuous metric tracking.
